sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89291" key="prosepixw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-χώννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n89291.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heap on, pile on</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1058a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
